---
title: "Previous guesses"
---

```{r}
source("R/load_data.R")
source("R/scoring.R")
source("R/dashboard.R")

fixtures <- load_fixtures()
results <- load_results()
predictions <- load_predictions()
scores <- score_predictions(predictions, results)
prev <- previous_guesses(predictions, fixtures, results, scores)
```

This page shows predictions for matches that are already finished or in the past.

```{r}
if (nrow(prev) == 0) {
  htmltools::tags$p("No previous guesses yet.")
} else {
  reactable::reactable(
    prev,
    searchable = TRUE,
    filterable = TRUE,
    defaultPageSize = 25,
    bordered = TRUE,
    striped = TRUE,
    columns = list(
      player     = reactable::colDef(name = "Player"),
      group      = reactable::colDef(name = "Group",  maxWidth = 80),
      match      = reactable::colDef(name = "Match"),
      prediction = reactable::colDef(name = "Guess",  maxWidth = 90),
      result     = reactable::colDef(name = "Result", maxWidth = 90),
      points     = reactable::colDef(name = "Points", maxWidth = 80),
      reason     = reactable::colDef(name = "Reason")
    )
  )
}
```
